name: 1-Tier Metal Lazy Susan Turntable Black - Brightroom™: Round Steel Serving Tray, Powder-Coated Finish, 11" Diameter
description:
Keep kitchen items neatly stored and readily accessible with this 1-Tier Metal Lazy Susan Turntable from Brightroom™. This round metal turntable features a one-tier design in a black powder-coated finish for lasting use. The multipurpose rotating storage rack is perfect for organizing condiments, spice jars, jam bottles, spreads and more conveniently on your dining table, kitchen counter or in a cabinet, and it can be spot cleaned for easy care.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
